reviews.comment:
Muchos clientes , un sólo empleado. Al pobre hombre no le alcanza el tiempo para atender a semejante demanda de combustible, más cuando tiene q cobrar con tarjeta.

(Translated by Google)
Many customers, only one employee. The poor man doesn't have enough time to handle such a high demand for fuel, especially since he has to process card payments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNVpxSk5nEAE

reviews.comment:
